title: Add ADRs for creative provisioning, inventory policy, and recovery architecture
description:
Council finding: Data/Pages/decisions.md has 13 ADRs (D-001 through D-013) but NONE address creative mode, inventory policy, or recovery architecture. These topics are documented only in tactical sprint-level task files.

Add ADRs for:
1. Creative provisioning policy — which layer owns inventory provisioning in creative mode, /give vs creative API precedence
2. Inventory single source of truth — which events are authoritative, how reconciliation works
3. Recovery architecture — recovery policy vs recovery execution, error classification
4. Any other cross-cutting decisions that have been made but not recorded

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
